pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target version is not updated.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.3.2 to align with Java 21 and modern ecosystem standards.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and Jakarta EE 9+; older versions may have compatibility issues or lack support for newer JDK features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud to version 2023.0.1 to match the new Spring Boot version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud versions are tightly coupled with Spring Boot; mismatched versions cause dependency resolution failures or runtime errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud Alibaba to version 2023.0.1.0 to match the new Spring Cloud version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud Alibaba versions are tied to Spring Cloud; mismatched versions cause dependency conflicts.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Nacos client to version 2.3.2 for compatibility and feature updates.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Nacos clients may have compatibility issues with newer Spring Cloud Alibaba versions or server-side changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok to version 1.18.34 for better Java 21 support and bug fixes.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may not fully support Java 21 language features or compiler internals.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Jackson to version 2.15.2 for security patches and performance improvements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Jackson versions may have known vulnerabilities or compatibility issues with newer Spring Boot versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade PageHelper to version 2.1.0 and switch to the Spring Boot starter artifact.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'pagehelper' is deprecated; the new 'pagehelper-spring-boot-starter' provides better auto-configuration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Logback to version 1.5.6 for Java 21 compatibility and bug fixes.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Logback versions may not fully support Java 21 or have known issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace MyBatis-Plus with MyBatis-Flex as the ORM framework.
pom.xml.why_exists: MyBatis-Plus is being deprecated in favor of MyBatis-Flex for better performance and features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the dynamic-datasource-spring-boot-starter dependency.
pom.xml.why_exists: The dynamic datasource functionality is no longer needed or is handled differently.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Servlet API 6.0.0 dependency for Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.x compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x uses Jakarta EE 9+ (jakarta.* namespace) instead of Java EE (javax.*); missing this dependency causes compile errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add HikariCP 5.1.0 as the connection pool implementation.
pom.xml.why_exists: HikariCP is the default connection pool in Spring Boot 3.x; explicit declaration ensures version control.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Prometheus registry dependency for metrics exposure.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for integrating with Prometheus monitoring systems.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Actuator dependency for health and metrics endpoints.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for exposing application health and metrics.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Springdoc OpenAPI dependencies for Swagger 3 documentation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for generating API documentation in Spring Boot 3.x.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add XXL-Job core dependency for distributed task scheduling.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for integrating with XXL-Job scheduling platform.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add OkHttp dependency for HTTP client functionality.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for making HTTP requests in the application.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Elasticsearch REST High Level Client dependency.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for interacting with Elasticsearch.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Fastjson2 dependency for JSON processing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for JSON serialization/deserialization.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jsoup dependency for HTML parsing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for parsing HTML content.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add EasyPoi dependency for Excel processing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for reading/writing Excel files.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add RapidOCR dependencies for OCR functionality.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for optical character recognition.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add ImageIO metadata dependency for image processing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for reading image metadata.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Sentinel datasource Nacos dependency for circuit breaking.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for integrating Sentinel with Nacos for dynamic rule configuration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Test dependency for unit testing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for writing and running unit tests.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot AMQP dependency for RabbitMQ integration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for integrating with RabbitMQ message broker.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jackson core and annotations dependencies explicitly.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures consistent versioning of Jackson components.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Hive JDBC dependency for database connectivity.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for connecting to Apache Hive.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add user-feign dependency for service-to-service communication.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for calling user service via Feign client.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add sora-swagger and sora-log internal dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for internal module integration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add -parameters compiler argument to preserve parameter names in bytecode.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for Spring Boot 3.x to resolve method parameters by name (e.g., @RequestParam).

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the finalName configuration from the build section.
pom.xml.why_exists: The final name is now managed differently or is no longer needed.

sora-auth/pom.xml.general_idea: Add dependency on the internal sora-log module to enable logging functionality.
Add dependency on the internal user-feign module to enable user service calls.
Configure the Maven build section with final name and Spring Boot plugin.

sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/SoraAut.general_idea: Add a custom annotation to the Spring Boot application class to enable cloud configuration features.

sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/control.general_idea: Replace Jakarta resource injection with Spring constructor injection for better testability and immutability.
Add Swagger/OpenAPI 3 annotations for API documentation generation.
Add SLF4J logger instance for logging capabilities.
Add custom user logging annotation to track login actions.
Rename endpoint path variable from 'userId' to 'name' to reflect semantic meaning.
sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/control.after:
@GetMapping("/login/{name}/{password}")
public Result login(@Parameter(description = "用户名") @PathVariable("name") String name, ...)

sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/control.general_idea: Rename controller method from 'selectUserById' to 'login' for better semantic clarity.
Add logout endpoint to handle user session termination.
Add register endpoint to handle user registration.
Update import statements to include new dependencies and consolidate Spring annotations.

sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/service.general_idea: Add import for the User domain class to support the new register method signature.
sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/service.why_exists: Compile error: cannot find symbol class User

sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/service.general_idea: Rename the login method from selectUserById to login and update parameter names for clarity.
Add a new register method to the AuthService interface.
Add a new logOut method to the AuthService interface.
Add UserFeign dependency to enable remote user service calls for authentication logic.
sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/service.why_exists: Method calls to userFeign would cause compilation errors if the dependency is not injected.

sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/service.general_idea: Refactor login method to use remote Feign client instead of local mock data.
sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/service.why_exists: The old method signature and implementation are replaced by new logic requiring the Feign client.

sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/service.general_idea: Update JWT claims to use user.getId() instead of user.getUserId() to match new User domain model.
sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/service.why_exists: The User class likely changed its ID getter from getUserId() to getId(), causing a compile error.

sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/service.general_idea: Update Redis key generation to use user.getId() instead of userId parameter.
sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/service.why_exists: The userId parameter was removed from the method signature, so referencing it causes a compile error.

sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/service.general_idea: Add logging for successful login events using SLF4J.
sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/service.after: logger.info("{}：用户[{}]登陆成功", LogConstants.LOGIN_LOG, user.getName());

sora-auth/src/main/java/com/sora/service.general_idea: Change login return value to include the generated token.
Implement register method by delegating to UserFeign.
Implement logout method to delete token from Redis.

sora-common/sora-core/pom.xml.general_idea: Add dependency for persisting Sentinel rate-limiting rules to Nacos.
Add Spring AMQP starter for RabbitMQ integration.
Explicitly add Jackson core and annotations dependencies.
Add Micrometer Prometheus registry for metrics export.
Add Spring Boot Actuator starter for health and metrics endpoints.
Add Elasticsearch REST High Level Client dependency.
Add MyBatis-Flex Spring Boot 3 starter to replace MyBatis-Plus.
Add Jakarta Servlet API dependency required for Spring Boot 3 / Java EE 9+ migration.
sora-common/sora-core/pom.xml.why_exists: Compile error: javax.servlet classes are no longer available in Jakarta EE 9+; code using servlet APIs requires jakarta.servlet.

sora-common/sora-core/pom.xml.general_idea: Add EasyPoi base dependency for Excel processing.
Add OkHttp3 dependency for HTTP client operations.
Add XXL-Job core dependency for distributed task scheduling.
Add Spring Boot Test starter for unit and integration testing.
Add internal Sora Swagger dependency for API documentation.

sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.general_idea: Update the Redis token prefix format to use a colon separator and uppercase key for better namespace organization.
Replace MyBatis-Plus annotations with MyBatis-Flex annotations to align with the ORM framework upgrade.
sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.why_exists: MyBatis-Plus annotations are not recognized by MyBatis-Flex, leading to runtime mapping errors or ignored configurations.
sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.before: import com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.*; ... @TableName("sora_user") ... @TableId(type = IdType.AUTO) private Long userId;
sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.after: import com.mybatisflex.annotation.*; ... @Table("sora_user") ... @Id(keyType = KeyType.Auto) private String id;

sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.general_idea: Add Swagger/OpenAPI 3 annotations for API documentation generation.
Add EasyPOI annotations for Excel import/export functionality.
Add Jackson and Spring Format annotations for date serialization and deserialization.
Refactor User entity fields to match the updated database schema and business requirements.
sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.before: private Long userId; private String name; private Integer age;
sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.after: private String id; private String name; private String sex; private Date birthday; private String password; private String phone; private String email; private Integer roleLevel; private Date createTime; private String banned; private String disabled;

sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.general_idea: Disable FAIL_ON_EMPTY_BEANS to prevent serialization errors for empty objects.
sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.why_exists: Jackson throws InvalidDefinitionException when serializing an empty class without getters/setters unless this feature is disabled.

sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.general_idea: Disable FAIL_ON_NULL_FOR_PRIMITIVES to allow null values for primitive types during deserialization.
sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.why_exists: Jackson throws MismatchedInputException if a null value is mapped to a primitive type (e.g., int, boolean) without this configuration.

sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.general_idea: Disable FAIL_ON_UNKNOWN_PROPERTIES to ignore unknown fields during deserialization.
sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.why_exists: Jackson throws UnrecognizedPropertyException if the JSON contains properties not present in the target Java class.

sora-common/sora-redis/src/main/java/com.general_idea: Replace field injection with constructor injection for Spring dependency management.
Add utility method to retrieve all hash keys for a given Redis key.
